query:
SELECT 
  i.tipo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN i.atendida = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as atendidas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN i.respondida = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as respondidas
FROM interacoes i
JOIN users u ON i.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name = 'Andrew'
  AND DATE(i.createdAt) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY i.tipo;
